name: Banksalad Open API
description: Banksalads MyData and credit/finance aggregation APIs for Korean fintech builders.

seo.title: Banksalad Open API — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Banksalad Open API: Banksalads MyData and credit/finance aggregation APIs for Korean fintech builders.

when_to_use: MyData-compliant financial aggregation for Korean fintechs
Credit scoring with open banking transaction history
Personal finance management app data feeds via MyData API
Loan underwriting with consented bank account data
Account switching service for Korean banking apps

pros: Direct access to Korean MyData credit aggregation
Pre-built endpoints for finance data in Korea
Local fintech workflows, no custom scraping
cons: Requires Korean entity and license approvals
Limited beyond credit and finance aggregation
review.verdict: Korea-focused MyData and credit API, essential for local fintech builders and nothing outside KR.
review.best_for: Korean fintech developers needing MyData-compliant credit and financial data aggregation
review.not_for: Any team building products outside South Korea or without a Korean licensed entity
